metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_5514
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 1, S1: Confocal imaging of FUS in mouse cortex and hippocampus showed localization to along dendrites and axons as well as association with synaptic markers Synapsin-1 (SYN1) and PSD95 (DLG4).

Figure 1c,d: sub-synaptic localization of FUS was determined using STED superresolution microscopy. Synaptic FUS preferentially associates with excitatory synapses, of which 46% contained FUS, while only 20% of analyzed inhibitory synapses showed FUS positivity.

Figure 1h: The majority of FUS was found localized to the presynaptic terminal, approx 150nm from the active zone, but postsynaptic localization (away from the PSD) was also observed.. Experimental description: Results: "To clarify the precise localization of FUS at the synapses, we first performed confocal analysis in mouse cortex (Fig. 1a, b) and hippocampus (Supplementary Fig. 1a, b)"

antibodies;
FUS Rb, Bethyl, A300-293A
FUS Rb, Bethyl, A300-294A
FUS Ms, 4H11, Santa CruZ, sc-47711
